gate_result: HIGH confidence, 0 anomalies, 0 warnings — gate passed

guides.degree_title: Master of Science, Curriculum and Instruction
Master of Science, Human Resource Management
Master of Science, Information Technology Management
guides.medium_detail: Source PDF has typo 'Accessibility and Accomodations' (single 'm') in the closing section. ACCESSIBILITY_RE requires 'Accommodations' (double 'm') and does not match. Capstone section has no Capstone heading above and no competency trigger, so the parser continues accumulating description_buf past the accessibility boilerplate to EOF. Capstone title and first description paragraph are correct; remaining description is polluted with boilerplate text. AoS content (9 courses, all descriptions, all competencies) is unaffected and clean. Parser confidence from code logic is HIGH (no anomalies, no warnings detected); manually downgraded to MEDIUM due to capstone description quality.

guides.degree_title: Master of Science, Information Technology - Product Management
Bachelor of Science, Information Technology (BSIT to MSIT)
guides.note: Pathway/bridge guide covering BSIT-to-MSIT curriculum. 35 courses is unusually large for a graduate guide — reflects the full combined undergraduate-to-graduate pathway, not just the MSIT courses. Parser handles it correctly. Family classification graduate_standard is accurate for this manifest; structure parses identically.

guides.degree_title: Master of Science in Marketing, Digital Marketing Specialization
Master of Science in Marketing, Marketing Analytics Specialization
Master of Science, Management and Leadership
guides.note: Capstone has 0 competency bullets. No competency trigger in capstone section — this is a property of the source guide (older format that does not include the competency bullet block for capstone). Not a parser failure. Capstone description is clean and correctly bounded.

sp_format: All 9 guides use 3-column multiline format (Course Description / CUs / Term). No 2-column or single-line format found in this family.

metadata_format_variants.note: Both formats already handled by extract_metadata(). No parser changes needed.

capstone_notes.note: Graduate capstone sections in this family do not include the 'This course covers the following competencies:' trigger. This is a source-guide format property, not a parser bug. Capstone descriptions are present but competency lists are empty.

structural_notes: MSITUG is a BSIT-to-MSIT pathway/bridge guide with 35 courses — significantly larger than other graduate guides (10-11 courses). Parser handles it identically. Family classification as graduate_standard is correct for parsing purposes.
Capstone sections in graduate_standard guides use an older format without the competency trigger block. Only capstone title and description are available; competency bullets are always 0.
MSITM capstone description is polluted with accessibility boilerplate due to source PDF typo. This is the sole MEDIUM case. AoS content unaffected.
Graduate Standard Path tables confirm 3-column multiline format uniformly — no format branching needed.

capstone_description_polluted.description: Source PDF typo 'Accomodations' (single m) in closing section prevents ACCESSIBILITY_RE match. No competency trigger in capstone. Parser collects description_buf to EOF, including boilerplate. Capstone title and opening description paragraph are correct; rest is polluted. AoS content unaffected.

safe_fields_for_downstream: Guide metadata / version (8/9 reliable; MSITM is older but present)
fields_to_exclude: MSITM capstone description — polluted with boilerplate text
Capstone competency bullets for MSITM and MSML — 0 bullets is source-guide format property

recommendation.summary: 9/9 parsed, 0 failures, 0 LOW confidence. 8 HIGH / 1 MEDIUM. MEDIUM case (MSITM) is a source PDF typo causing capstone description pollution — AoS content unaffected. No parser changes needed or made.
recommendation.next_family_rationale: mba (3 guides: MBA already gate-tested HIGH) is the logical next rollout. All 3 guides have manifest HIGH confidence. MBA is already parsed — add MBAHA and MBAITM.
